expectedObservation: mutation sensitivity will fail or require caveats on at least one fresh holdout.
expectedFailureMode: fresh replay changes the derived descriptor
rivalTheoryPrediction: candidate remains more specific than rival explanation on this check
expectedMutationTestResult: mutation should not fully break the decision
expectedReplayResult: replay should match source receipt and coarse descriptor
falsifier: Candidate is weakened if a fresh target has stable receipt and descriptor residual language but the simple baseline or rival explanation fully explains the observation.
noEditRule: This card is frozen before holdout selection and must not be edited after the freeze commit.
